name: Tailor's Scissors
descs:
[Effects apply only to #6 Deployed Identity]

Slash Skills(except E.G.O Skills) with 2- Coins gain Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage.

Single-Coin Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal +20% damage instead.

[Effects apply only to <style="upgradeHighlight">#4</style>, #6 Deployed Identities]

Slash Skills(except E.G.O Skills) with 2- Coins gain Clash Power +1 <style="upgradeHighlight">and deal +15% damage</style>.

Single-Coin Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+25%</style> damage instead.

[Effects apply only to #4, #6 Deployed Identities]

Slash Skills(except E.G.O Skills) with 2- Coins gain Clash Power +1 <style="upgradeHighlight">and deal +20% damage</style>.

Single-Coin Skills gain Clash Power +1 and deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+30%</style> damage instead.
